data.content: Revised plan: 5 test groups (~140 lines) covering canonical parsing + legacy normalization + unknown rejection, StepMetadata resolution with canonical names, prompt rendering from StepMetadata (all 4 output-conditional prompts including shipment_review), backward compat for workflows without per-step outputs, and bundle compat validation. All server-side Rust, no Playwright. Depends on c8f4 + 0d93 finalizing contracts.
